title: Eastern Tea Brand Ink Fashion Poster AI
sourceTitle: Eastern Tea Brand Ink Fashion Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Vertical 9:16 premium Eastern tea brand ink-fashion poster for 清岚茶集, built around white porcelain gaiwan with green tea leaves and pale jade tea soup. Subject: A slender elegant Eastern muse presents white porcelain gaiwan with green tea leaves and pale jade tea soup through gently lifting the gaiwan near her shoulder while turning slightly sideways, keeping the tea product clearly visible as the brand anchor. Scene: White-but-not-empty rice-paper field with pale mist, light ink wash layers, low-saturation gradient, and subtle Eastern motifs that support the tea mood without overpowering the product. Composition: Vertical 9:16 luxury tea campaign poster with product anchor in the foreground, refined muse interaction, flowing tea steam as the dynamic core, generous ink-wash negative space, and one independent finished image. Signature Elements: Visible tea product, calligraphic tea steam, Eastern muse, modern Chinese couture silhouette, flowing sleeves and hair echoing the steam, white negative space, subtle moon ring, water ripple, bamboo shadow, mountain haze, flower branch, ink cloud, rock texture, old paper, or vapor motif. Style: Oriental ink fashion illustration fused with tea-gift campaign design, rice-paper texture, ink-wash emptiness, delicate pale color, modern New Chinese muse styling, and refined Eastern luxury restraint. Color Palette: Moon white, celadon green, jade white, warm grey, pale gold, soft ink black, amber tea, and delicate low-saturation watercolor transitions. Lighting: Soft diffuse paper light, gentle tea-steam glow, translucent fabric highlights, subtle product reflections, and quiet airy atmosphere. Materials: Rice paper grain, white porcelain or clay tea ware, tea leaves, tea soup, gift-box or tea-cake texture, translucent gauze layers, ink bleeding, fine pleats, and thin gold line accents. Typography: 清岚茶集 defines the brand identity internally rather than appearing as printed copy. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
